name.ja: <ruby>忍<rt>にん</rt></ruby><ruby>法<rt>ぽう</rt></ruby> <ruby>無<rt>む</rt></ruby><ruby>敵<rt>てき</rt></ruby><ruby>変<rt>へん</rt></ruby><ruby>化<rt>げ</rt></ruby>の<ruby>術<rt>じゅつ</rt></ruby>

effect.en: Ritual Summon a Level 8 monster with 2500 ATK/1500 DEF by sending face-up WIND Attribute Warrior Type monsters from your field to the Graveyard whose total Levels equal 8 or more as material (you cannot use more monsters than necessary as material). This turn, the monster Special Summoned by this effect cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects.
